rows.notes: Centered page year at top. No monetary columns present. Very clear and legible.
Clear heading 'Soluta Varia. Amt forward' followed by well-aligned figures 404 | 19 | 6. Vertical ruling lines are distinct; values validate (s<20, d<12).

rows.description: To Mr Morgan for Valuation of two livings
rows.notes: Description legible as valuation of 'two livings' to Mr Morgan. Amount columns clearly aligned as 2 | 2 | 0; wording 'livings' inferred but strongly supported by common ledger phrasing.

rows.description: To Mr Stone Tyles for Roof Gutters for Eldington Channel
rows.notes: Amount 6 | 16 | 11 very clear and aligned. Payee name and 'Tyles' / 'Tiles' and place 'Eldington Channel' readable but with minor ambiguity in surname spelling and whether 'Tiles/Tyles'.

rows.description: To Watts Carpenter, for the seats in Eldington Channel
rows.notes: Description 'Watts Carpenter' and purpose 'for the seats in Eldington Channel' are legible. Numeric columns 22 | 19 | 3 are well aligned and clear.

rows.description: To Rev. S. H. Cornish - 2 yrs Sal. on 200l for Distn Augment to Dudley 1831
rows.notes: Amount 16 | 0 | 0 is clear. Several words in the description are abbreviated and the place/term after 'Augment' is partially faded ('Dudley' is plausible). '2 yrs Sal. on 200l' reading is consistent with common accounts but some letters are indistinct.

rows.description: To Messrs Cox Insurance at Little Sea
rows.notes: Amounts 12 | 16 | 7 are clear. Payee appears to be 'Messrs Cox Insurance' but place word after 'at' is faint and could be 'Little Sea'/'Little Cow'/other; reading chosen by letter shapes but uncertain.

rows.description: To Do. for Hildington, Yarnton, & Hampfield
rows.notes: 'Do.' indicates same payee. Place names read as 'Hildington, Yarnton, & Hampfield' from cursive — letters ambiguous especially middle name(s); amounts 8 | 16 | 6 are clear and validate.

rows.description: To Wyatt - Washing seats in Hall Channel
rows.notes: Surname 'Wyatt' and phrase about 'seats' are legible though verb might be 'washing' or 'fixing'; numeric columns 3 | 5 | 11 are distinct and valid.
Name 'Bliss' and occupation 'Painter' are clearly written. Amount 6 | 17 | 4 well aligned and unambiguous.
Firm name 'Bush & Pilcher' (or Pilcher variant) and trade 'Ironmongers' readable. Large pounds figure 69 is clear; 5s 11d aligned and valid.
Names and trade 'Glaziers' are legible. Amount columns 57 | 5 | 11 are unambiguous and align with ruling lines.
Amount 7 | 3 | 6 clear. Partner names are harder to read; I have rendered them as 'Fletcher & Knappes' though second name letters are indistinct and could be another variant.

Amount 17 | 12 | 6 clear. Description likely 'Hayes for Betting Books &c' though middle word could be 'Bitting' or 'Binding' — letter shapes suggest 'Betting/Binding'; chosen as 'Betting' with moderate confidence.
Trade 'Plasterer' and amount 67 | 7 | 0 clear. Surname reads as 'Henslett' though could be 'Hewlett' — letters 'ns/ew' ambiguous in handwriting.
Short amount 1 | 15 | 0 is clear. Surname appears to be 'Hickman' or 'Hoskman' (handwriting ambiguous); trade 'Silversmith' is legible.
'Oxford Herald' reading fits letter shapes and context; 'Advertisements' is clear. Values 4 | 18 | 0 aligned and unambiguous.
'Do.' indicates same as previous. 'Journal' and duplication 'Do.' visible. Amount 1 | 19 | 0 clear though small.

Amount 20 | 5 | 4 is distinct. Description is difficult to read; letters suggest something like 'Pundits File' or 'Purdue's File' — chosen literal reading but with low confidence due to faded/connected letters.
Name 'Watts' and occupation 'Painter' are clearly written. Amount 34 | 11 | 8 well aligned and unambiguous.
Firm name 'Harris & Plowman' readable; amounts 58 | 13 | 9 clear and validate.
Trade 'Mason' and surname 'Knowles' are legible. Amount columns 64 | 5 | 8 are clear and consistent with ruling lines.

rows.description: Heslett for the New Garrats No. 3
rows.notes: Amount 109 | 9 | 0 is unambiguous. The payee/description 'Heslett for the New Garrats No. 3' contains several uncertain letter groups (e.g. 'Garrats' might be 'Garrets'/'Garrits'); kept closest visual reading.
Large amount 330 | 19 | 2 clearly written and aligned. 'Leach for Do. Do.' is consistent with preceding 'Do.' usage; name 'Leach' legible.
Final total at page bottom with prominent '£' symbol and underlining. Numerals 1339 | 5 | 5 are clear and align with the pounds/shillings/pence ruling; validates against column positions.
